examples: Two of them suffered from retinitis pigmentosa, while the third had a similar disease.
It most commonly appears as retinitis, which causes blurred vision and can lead to blindness.
About 100, 000 have retinitis pigmentosa, a progressive, genetic disorder that usually manifests in childhood.
In a test on ten patients with retinitis pigmentosa, an inherited disease involving retinal degeneration, vision improved significantly.
Mr. Isacoff says technologies of this type could one day treat blinding diseases in humans such as retinitis pigmentosa.
